stack: Rust workspace (reqwest 0.12, jsonschema, wiremock) integrating flint-forge GraphQL + flint-realtime-fabric HTTP/WS
budget_note: Minimal phase — writes and fabric health reuse existing deps. Only genuinely new question was the WS client for the stretch subscription goal.

candidates.name: reuse fpa-forge graphql_query (reqwest, present)
candidates.evidence: A mutation is the same POST /graphql with a mutation string + bearer. c002's graphql_query already sends Authorization: Bearer and maps 401→Unauthorized; extend to map forge 403 (Keto/Cedar denial) → Unauthorized. Forge enforces authz server-side; the agent forwards and posts.
candidates.notes: Q1: build typed pg_graphql mutation (recommend) vs proxy raw GraphQL. Decide at spec.

candidates.name: reqwest GET /healthz
candidates.evidence: frf-gateway GET /healthz → {status,version}. Mirror c002's forge OpenAPI GET: 2xx→Ok, else Downstream, unreachable→Transport. Add reqwest to fpa-fabric + wiremock dev-dep (already MSRV-verified 1.93).

candidates.name: tokio-tungstenite
candidates.source: crates.io; used by flint-realtime-fabric (frf-gateway, atproto bridge) AND flint-gate (client/core)
candidates.evidence: House-standard async WS client — strong cross-repo precedent (fabric + gate both use it). Connect to /ws/v1/subscribe, bridge frames to AG-UI SSE. Only needed if the WS subscription goal is pulled in this phase.
candidates.notes: Pin decision: match siblings (0.26) vs latest (0.29) — verify at execute if adopted. Recommend deferring the WS goal; if kept, adopt tokio-tungstenite.

gaps.gap: Write-kind guard + phase-2 test hardening (debt paydown)

candidates.name: internal (no dep)
candidates.evidence: Write-kind guard in dispatch_forge (return Downstream for unimplemented write kinds). Unit tests for AuthContext bearer carried/none + MCP tools/list schema advertisement. No libraries involved.

key_adopt_verdicts: Forge writes: REUSE c002 graphql_query (no new dep); map 403→Unauthorized
Fabric health: REUSE reqwest GET /healthz (+ wiremock dev-dep)
WS subscription (stretch): tokio-tungstenite if in-scope (house standard); recommend defer
Write-kind guard + test hardening: internal BUILD
